positive: An intricate, symmetrical mandala design featuring stylized cosmic elements: nebulae swirls, celestial constellations, crescent moons, and abstract planetary rings. The primary color palette should be deep indigo, shimmering gold, and vibrant sapphire blue. The composition must be highly detailed, featuring clean, sharp lines and distinct boundaries suitable for screen printing on fabric. Style: Neo-geometric, ethereal etching style with high contrast. Composition: Central, radial symmetry, filling the entire frame. Lighting: Studio quality, diffuse cosmic glow emphasizing metallic gold accents. Print-friendly details: Vector art quality, clean silhouettes, solid areas of color to maximize print clarity.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermarks, messy, low detail, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, solid colors, photo-realistic, 3d render, gradient, poorly drawn
